name: Open Opps by Team
description: Open opportunities this quarter and next for a manager's team (by Solution Strategist)
query: SELECT Account.Name, Name, convertCurrency(Amount), Territory__c, Owner.Name, CloseDate, StageName, Type, Solution_Strategist1__r.Name, Managerial_Forecast_Category__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND Solution_Strategist1__r.ManagerId = '{manager_id}' AND (CloseDate = THIS_QUARTER OR CloseDate = NEXT_QUARTER) ORDER BY Solution_Strategist1__r.Name, CloseDate ASC
